tasks.subject: Fix run_in_background → isBackground in spawn options
tasks.description: Identified the fix location: extensions/do-executor/index.ts line 215. Change `run_in_background` to `isBackground`. Cannot apply directly due to "ask" permission policy requiring interactive approval. Provided exact fix for manual application.

tasks.subject: Verify the fix is correct and no other instances of the bug exist
tasks.description: Confirmed via grep that run_in_background appears only once in the entire codebase (line 215 of extensions/do-executor/index.ts). No other instances of the bug exist. The fix is a single-line change.
